summary: Fox News 'Will Cain Show' LIVE split-screen segment with anchor and Admiral Brian Christine reassuring viewers that Hantavirus (Andes variant) risk to Americans is very low. Standard cable-news talking-heads format with chyron and inset B-roll of an Omaha scene. Not produced entertainment/youth content.
notable_text: LIVE; OFFICIALS SAY HANTAVIRUS RISK REMAINS LOW; FOX NEWS ALERT
